title: Privacy Policy
section1Body: We collect information you provide when creating an account (name, email, avatar) and messages, files, and other content you send through the service. We also collect basic connection metadata (IP address, device type, session timestamps) for operational purposes.
section2Body: Your data is used solely to provide the messaging service: delivering messages, storing conversation history, managing contacts, and maintaining your account. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for their own purposes.
section3Body: All data is encrypted in transit (TLS) and stored with industry-standard security measures. Passwords are hashed using bcrypt. You can enable two-factor authentication (TOTP or email OTP) for additional account security.
section4Item1: Access your data — view your profile, messages, and contacts at any time
section4Item2: Export your data — download all your information in a portable format
section4Item3: Delete your account — permanently remove your data from the service
section4Item4: Correct your information — update your profile details
section5Body: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. When you delete your account, all associated data is permanently removed within a reasonable period.
section6Body: We use OAuth providers (GitHub, Google) solely for authentication. No message content or personal data is shared with these providers. You can disable or unlink these connections at any time.
section7Body: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact the server administrator.
